title: ilex integerrima
intro: Ilex integerrima, also known as the smooth-leaf holly, is a plant species in the Ilex genus that is native to China and Southeast Asia. The smooth-leaf holly is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ilex integerrima include reducing fever, relieving rheumatic pain, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and berries are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to make teas, infusions, and tinctures.
